narrative:
Flushing Township has 1,211 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.0%, a clear Republican lean of 8.3 percentage points.
